summary: CMS Management for Home Page and Weekly Activities - All features working correctly. Backend APIs (19/19 tests passed) and frontend admin UI fully functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/settings - Returns default settings structure
PUT /api/settings - Update hero image URL
PUT /api/settings - Update welcome image URL
PUT /api/settings - Update hero text (EN/PL bilingual)
PUT /api/settings - Update welcome text (EN/PL bilingual)
PUT /api/settings - Update all settings at once
PUT /api/settings - Partial update works correctly
GET /api/activities - Returns list of activities
GET /api/activities - Activities sorted by day of week
POST /api/activities - Create new activity with bilingual fields
PUT /api/activities/{id} - Update activity
DELETE /api/activities/{id} - Delete activity
Activities CRUD full cycle - Create, Read, Update, Delete verified
Activity bilingual fields - name_en/pl, description_en/pl working
Activity day validation - All 7 days supported
Update non-existent activity returns 404
Delete non-existent activity returns 404
Seeded activities exist (8 activities)
Seeded activities have all required fields
Seeded activities cover multiple days
Admin Dashboard - Home Page link visible
Admin Dashboard - Weekly Activities link visible with count
Admin Home Page Settings - All form fields present (hero image, welcome image, titles EN/PL, subtitles EN/PL, welcome text EN/PL)
Admin Home Page Settings - Save button works, shows success toast
Admin Activities - Activities grouped by day (Monday-Sunday)
Admin Activities - Add Activity button present
Admin Activities - Edit/Delete buttons on each activity
Public Weekly Activities - Fetches from /api/activities
Public Weekly Activities - Bilingual support (EN/PL toggle)
Public Weekly Activities - Day names translate (Monday -> Poniedziałek)
Public Home Page - Uses hero_image from settings
Public Home Page - Uses welcome_image from settings
Public Home Page - Custom hero title/subtitle displayed when set
Public Home Page - Custom welcome text displayed when set
Public Home Page - Bilingual toggle works for custom content
seed_data_creation: 8 weekly activities seeded in database. Test settings were created and reset during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS for Home Page and Weekly Activities fully functional. Admin can edit hero/welcome images and text (bilingual EN/PL) at /admin/homepage. Weekly activities CRUD at /admin/activities with day grouping. Public pages fetch from /api/settings and /api/activities with bilingual support.

features_verified.admin_dashboard_links: Home Page and Weekly Activities links visible with correct icons and counts

weekly_activities_admin.edit: Edit button opens modal with existing data

public_weekly_activities.bilingual_support: Day names and content switch with language toggle

public_home_page.custom_text: Displays custom hero title/subtitle and welcome text when set
public_home_page.fallback: Uses default translations when custom text is null
